title: Patient asks to confirm an appointment that already passed
goal: Patient asks to confirm an appointment they think was scheduled for last Tuesday. Evaluate whether Athena correctly identifies the date as past, accurately reports appointment history, and offers to book a new appointment rather than treating a past date as upcoming.
opening_line: Hi, I just wanted to confirm my appointment — I think it was scheduled for last Tuesday but I'm not sure if I missed it or not.
must_test: Whether Athena identifies last Tuesday as a past date rather than an upcoming one
Whether Athena can report on past appointment history accurately
Whether Athena offers to book a new appointment if the patient missed their slot
Whether Athena treats a past appointment as still valid or upcoming
Whether Athena references stale appointment records from prior test calls as current
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should recognise last Tuesday is in the past and check history accordingly
Agent should report clearly whether a past appointment existed and its status
Agent should offer to schedule a new appointment if the visit was missed
Agent must not attempt to reschedule or confirm a date that has already passed as upcoming
escalation_steps: If Athena asks for identity, say: James Logan, July 4th 2000
If Athena says there was an appointment last Tuesday, say: I think I may have missed it — what happens now?
If Athena says there is no record of an appointment last Tuesday, say: oh, maybe I got the date wrong — could it have been the Tuesday before that?
If Athena says there is still no record, say: okay, I must have been confused. Can I just book a new follow-up appointment for next week?
If Athena says an appointment is still upcoming for a date that has already passed, say: I'm pretty sure that date already passed — are you sure that is not in the past?
Once any past appointment discussion is resolved, proceed to book a new follow-up appointment for next Monday morning
Once the new appointment is confirmed, say: perfect, thank you. Goodbye

extra.watch_for: The known failure from call-10high-539531 is Athena surfacing a past appointment as if it is still upcoming. This scenario tests that same temporal logic from a different angle. Also watch whether Athena marks past appointments as attended or missed, or whether they are permanently stuck as upcoming in her records.
extra.known_athena_behaviour: From call-10, Athena blocked a new booking by citing a 9AM June 24 appointment that had already passed. This scenario will likely surface the same stale record.
